dsl_rule.translation_notes: Interpreted '20-period high break' as Donchian channel upper breach (trend initiation signal). Exit conditions map to 50-period MA crossover (3-bar confirmation implemented via close crossing below/above sma_50). Hard stop at 2% risk per parameters. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to allow both long and short entries based on trend direction. Hold period set to 999 days to reflect 'hold until trend breaks' philosophy rather than time-based exit.

backtest_rule.reason: Interpreted '20-period high break' as Donchian channel upper breach (trend initiation signal). Exit conditions map to 50-period MA crossover (3-bar confirmation implemented via close crossing below/above sma_50). Hard stop at 2% risk per parameters. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to allow both long and short entries based on trend direction. Hold period set to 999 days to reflect 'hold until trend breaks' philosophy rather than time-based exit.

source_rule_text: Stay with the established trend and avoid prematurely taking profits; exit only when the trend itself changes, not based on emotional desire to lock in gains.
